title: Government Withdraws Shelter Protections Without Replacement
description: Government eliminates emergency shelter programs without constitutionally sufficient replacement, leaving a class of persons without basic shelter protection through circumstances beyond their control. Courts preserve existing protections against backsliding under Art XVIII §2.3-§2.4 and require replacement measures. Tests the anti-backsliding rule and interim enforcement authority.

details.action: defunding of emergency shelter programs and elimination of housing-assistance obligations without replacement
